prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 high-fashion fantasy portrait of a young woman kneeling in an elaborate cherry-blossom installation, with a deliberately featureless face covered by a centered matte dusty-pink rectangular mask. She has very long, tousled pale platinum-blonde hair and fair glowing skin, posed with one hand touching layered black necklaces at her chest and the other hand resting on the floor. Dress her in an ornate off-shoulder pink and ivory couture gown with lace bodice, ruffled sleeves, oversized ribbon bows on both arms, sheer lace gloves or sleeves, black ribbon wrapping accents, dangling black bead details, and a voluminous skirt pooling around her knees. Surround her with a dense romantic background of cherry blossoms, petals, and circular hoop structures resembling mizuhiki cords: count exactly 14 visible circular hoops and disks, including 9 thin metallic white or rose-gold rings, 3 large pink floral disks, and 2 dark black floral disks. Add scattered pink petals on the floor, soft foreground blossom blur at the bottom edge, and a dreamy pastel palette of blush pink, cream, ivory, rose gold, and soft gray. Lighting should be bright, ethereal, backlit, and diffused, with shallow depth of field, glossy skin highlights, delicate fabric texture, cinematic editorial composition, ultra-detailed photorealistic rendering, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
